summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-15 (expanded proxy chain), REQ-17 (Try Again and Open in New Window buttons), and most of REQ-16 are addressed. However, REQ-15 is missing the sixth proxy (yacdn.org), and REQ-16's TikTok embed URL primary attempt strategy has some gaps.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add https://yacdn.org/proxy/<url> as the sixth proxy in the fallback chain (after thingproxy.freeboard.io).
missing_requirements.reason: The PROXY_LIST in useTabs.ts contains only 5 entries: allorigins.win, corsproxy.io, cors-anywhere, codetabs.com, and thingproxy. The yacdn.org proxy is not present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: When the URL matches tiktok.com, use https://www.tiktok.com/embed/ as the PRIMARY attempt (before proxy chain), not just a fallback after all proxies fail.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff describes TikTok embed URL as a 'final fallback after all proxies fail' rather than the primary attempt. The spec requires the embed URL to be the primary attempt with the proxy chain as secondary.

hallucinated_features.description: ProxyInfoPanel component with expandable accordion sections showing CORS proxy configuration details.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a ProxyInfoPanel or ProxyInfoButton component. This appears to be an additional feature not requested.
